title: The Dolphin Race
summary: The Sirian cetaceans — Specialist Ra's seven knowledges, and medicine made of consciousness.
markdown:
The **Dolphin Race** identifies its own lineage when it speaks in the April 14, 2024 session:
*"We are the dolphin race of **Sirian**… I am Specialist Ra, in consciousness application —
appliance of what you prefer called **medical technology**."* The archive's cetaceans are
[Sirius](/lore/sirians/) people — and their specialty is healing engineered from mind.

Ra's teaching is offered as **"seven knowledge of how to harness your soul… to master creation
itself,"** and it begins at the root: *believe in yourself* — because self-belief eliminates
fear, and fear, Ra says, is nothing but "the belief of lack." From there the medicine follows:
all consciousness is connected, mind shapes reality, and so thought, speech, and intention are
clinical instruments — the same consciousness-physics the [Arcturian Nara](/lore/arcturians/)
applies to starships, applied by the Dolphins to the body.

Their history in the archive runs deep as well: the galactic war of **dolphins against
[reptilians](/lore/reptilians/)** some 10.5 million years ago — the conflict that brought the
[Insectoids](/lore/insectoids/) to Earth — makes the Dolphin Race one of the oldest named
powers in the [chronicle](/lore/the-chronicle/), and the 2020 sessions count them among the
teachers of early humanity. Elder warriors turned healers: that is the arc the archive gives
them.
